Primary morning surface

Morning Command Card

Use this instead of a long morning check-in: accept or adjust today’s operating plan, then submit the signal back to Sapho.

Thursday, July 23 priority-heavy

Goal connection

This week: By Sunday night, 2026-07-26, reschedule the missed ENT follow-up, protect three body sessions or two lifts plus one cardio/pickleball substitute, make one Aubrey/fatherhood container move, and run a finance brake focused on Mom housing cost reality plus no unplanned shopping/dining/leisure spend.

Next move: Jenffry replies with accepted goals, one cut, and any strategy correction; Sapho then finalizes this section and updates affected area Goal Spines if needed.

This week's goal0%

Career

Work quality, senior UX growth, AI leverage, and business-development experiments.

StatusCareer splits into Work and Business; AI-agent work can be work leverage, hobby, or business possibility depending context.
Current priorityPrincess UX/work quality first, business-development possibility second, with the long-term business direction kept visible.
Active signalssenior UX growth, Princess UX direction, Blaze Creative Agency, AI leverage.
Open loopsclarify business direction without overloading mental health or work execution.
Next concrete moveuse work for job/practice context and business for venture experiments.

Career

  • Status: Career splits into Work and Business; AI-agent work can be work leverage, hobby, or business possibility depending context. - Current priority: Princess UX/work quality first, business-development possibility second, with the long-term business direction kept visible. - Active signals: senior UX growth, Princess UX direction, Blaze Creative Agency, AI leverage. - Open loops: clarify business direction without overloading mental health or work execution. - Next concrete move: use work for job/practice context and business for venture experiments. Career is the parent area for work, job craft, professional leverage, business experiments, and future earning power.

Work

  • Status: Active career execution domain. - Current priority: Princess UX/UI quality, work leverage, and sustainable senior UX growth. - Active signals: Princess UX, Storybook, Jira/TickTick boundaries, AI-assisted work leverage. - Open loops: avoid after-hours spillover and admin soup. - Next concrete move: route Princess-specific context into princess-ux and princess-storybook. Work contains the day-job/professional execution side of Career.

Business

  • Status: Possibility space, not the lead execution domain. - Current priority: preserve business-development option value without overcommitting. - Active signals: Blaze Creative Agency, AI-agent work, proof assets, income leverage. - Open loops: define business experiments only when capacity supports them. - Next concrete move: keep this as a lightweight context page until an experiment is chosen. Business contains Blaze Creative Agency, business-development ideas, and earning-leverage experiments. Career source material is preserved on career.

Asian-fusion/Cuban/Peruvian-style food, craft cocktails, and beers on tap; useful for a leisure dinner, date-night, or social/family meal option when budget and timing fit. Address: 14690 SW 26th St, Miami, FL 33175. Phone: 305-227-8818. Source Google Maps link: https://maps.app.goo.gl/dgRkHa2TujUsg8yBA

Hedonistic Calculator

Same leisure rubric as the Leisure cockpit: one activity name, one description, 10 metrics, and the same weights and friction handling.

Hedonic fit score —

Move the sliders to calculate.

The calculator updates the current score card; Pipeline entries stay in the list below.

Benefit metrics: enjoyment, restoration, excitement, social, novelty, meaning, and physical health. Friction metrics: money, risk, and logistics.

Nested structured timeline

My Life Story

This tab is now a blank story architecture. The whole life story follows a narrative arc, and each chapter repeats the same arc at chapter scale.

Wiki page

Story structure rule

Every level uses the same structure: opening image, want/need, pressure, choice, turning point, cost, meaning, and bridge. This keeps the story truthful without letting one chapter become the whole life.

Chapter 1 Origins Setup / ordinary world

Known seed: born in Cuba. Early-life story still needs raw capture.

  1. 1. Opening image

    What the world feels like at this point in the life story.

    Blank — needs source material.
  2. 2. Want / need

    What Jenffry wants externally, and what he needs internally.

    Blank — needs source material.
  3. 3. Pressure / conflict

    The obstacle, wound, duty, fear, or constraint that makes this chapter a story.

    Blank — needs source material.
  4. 4. Choice

    The decision, avoidance, sacrifice, or action that changes direction.

    Blank — needs source material.
  5. 5. Turning point

    The moment after which the old arrangement cannot fully continue.

    Blank — needs source material.
  6. 6. Cost

    What was lost, paid, delayed, or carried.

    Blank — needs source material.
  7. 7. Meaning

    What this chapter taught, distorted, healed, or revealed.

    Blank — needs source material.
  8. 8. Bridge

    How this chapter hands momentum to the next one.

    Blank — needs source material.

Nested scene slots

Each remembered incident inside this chapter should use the same mini-arc: opening image → want/need → conflict → choice → turning point → cost → meaning → bridge.

  • Scene 1: Blank — event, age/date, people, place, emotional signal.
  • Scene 2: Blank — event, age/date, people, place, emotional signal.
  • Scene 3: Blank — event, age/date, people, place, emotional signal.

Sapho operating system

System architecture cockpit

A visual map of how Sapho is structured: identity, memory, wiki, skills, schedules, tasks, dashboard, raw evidence, and backups. The goal is fast orientation without turning the system tab into another wiki dump.

System health snapshot
Architecture
Strong
Legibility
Improving
Bloat risk
Watched
Preserve useful continuity; keep every layer bounded to one job.
Parts + connections

How the Sapho system fits together

The diagram shows the live operating loop: user inputs become routed context, execution, recurring reviews, dashboard views, and backup/learning traces.

active routing context / source reads protection + learning feedback
Current architecture

The operating stack

Each layer has a distinct job. Routing stays clean when no layer tries to do another layer's work.

SOUL / Persona
Identity, tone, boundaries, Mentat posture, and default operating loop.
Who Sapho is
Memory
Compact durable preferences, recurring corrections, environment facts, and stable user context.
Always-on facts
Wiki
Plans, decisions, focus, open loops, goals, life areas, and substantial continuity.
Structured truth
Skills
Reusable procedures, proven workflows, tool conventions, and operational rules.
How to work
Cron jobs
Daily refreshes, weekly/monthly reviews, audits, backups, and quiet maintenance rhythms.
Reliable recurrence
TickTick
Concrete next actions, dates, logistics, reminders, and execution follow-through.
Do-now layer
Dashboard
Visible cockpit for current goals, health, finance, leisure, system state, and wiki navigation.
Display layer
Raw + Backups
Original evidence, unprocessed captures, system snapshots, and restore material.
Source + recovery
Live inventory

The actual soft system now

This is the visible control surface Jenffry asked for: active recurring jobs, the main Sapho skills in use, and the non-wiki system files that shape current behavior.

SOUL.md
Stable Sapho identity, Mentat tone, boundaries, and default behavior.
/opt/data/SOUL.md
Persistent memory + user profile
Compact always-loaded facts: Jenffry preferences, Sapho environment facts, and durable corrections.
injected into each session
Wiki system pages
Current strategy, open loops, decisions, source-of-truth registry, dashboard rules, autonomy policy, run ledger.
/opt/data/wiki/system/
Skills library
Procedures Sapho loads before action: continuity, TickTick, health, finance, Google, Hermes, and related workflows.
/opt/data/skills/
Cron registry
Recurring check-ins, reviews, backups, dashboard refresh, and maintenance jobs.
/opt/data/cron/jobs.json
Dashboard publisher
Builds and deploys this cockpit to Netlify from wiki, TickTick, Hevy, SimpleFIN, and system sources.
/opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py
Run ledger
Meaningful Sapho system changes and maintenance traces.
/opt/data/logs/agent-runs/
Backups
Daily Sapho restore archives and GitHub-safe backup mirror.
/opt/data/scripts/sapho_system_backup.sh
Integrations
TickTick execution, Hevy body/gym source, SimpleFIN finance, Google Workspace, Telegram delivery.
configured under /opt/data

Active Sapho skills

Main procedures Sapho actually uses

  • jenffry-continuity — Use when Jenffry asks about current plans, decisions, focus, open loops, continuity, memory, or when a conversation produces durable context that should be added to his wiki without clutter. (skills/note-taking/jenffry-continuity/SKILL.md)
  • ticktick-task-management — Connect and operate TickTick as Jenffry's task source of truth, with Sapho as task-manager/advisor through Telegram. (skills/.archive/ticktick-task-management/SKILL.md)
  • hermes-agent — Configure, extend, or contribute to Hermes Agent. (skills/autonomous-ai-agents/hermes-agent/SKILL.md)
  • google-workspace — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets via gws CLI or Python. (skills/.archive/google-workspace/SKILL.md)
  • health-and-fitness-planning — Use when Jenffry asks about health optimization, fitness planning, workout app integrations, symptom-to-action planning, supplements, labs, or turning health research into concrete execution without TickTick bloat. (skills/health/health-and-fitness-planning/SKILL.md)
  • personal-finance-budgeting — Use when analyzing Jenffry's transaction exports, creating budgets, assessing weekly/monthly spending, answering affordability questions, or distinguishing recurring income from one-off deposits/refunds/transfers. (skills/.archive/personal-finance-budgeting/SKILL.md)
  • weekend-social-planning — Use when planning Jenffry's weekly social/fun activity and intentional weekend outing through Sapho instead of TickTick recurring goal tasks. (skills/productivity/weekend-social-planning/SKILL.md)
What is intentionally not listed

No full skill dump

This tab shows the Sapho-relevant skills and cron-loaded skills, not every installed general skill. Full wiki source pages stay in the Wiki tab; this section is the operating cockpit.

Information movement

The operating engine

The pattern is capture, distill, route, review, execute, and improve only when the signal is stable.

Inputchat, voice, files, tools
Captureraw material when needed
Distilldurable shape
Routememory / wiki / skill / task
Reviewdaily, weekly, monthly
ExecuteTickTick and tools
Improvepatch rules after proof
Current strategy

Active direction

  • Status: Scannable control tower; 2026-07-19 hygiene found the active weekly goal expires tonight and still needs review acceptance/evidence rather than automatic rewrite.
  • Current priority: clarity-first execution with mental health leading; the next major meaning-making project is integrating Jenffry's life story with a comprehensive personal philosophy.
  • Active signals: one big important task plus one quick win per day; overloaded workday evenings use triage, not moral-test execution; TickTick remains execution-only; life-story/philosophy work should be bounded and meaning-making, not rumination homework.
  • Open loops: keep the active weekly/monthly goals synchronized with open-loops, life-area summaries, and accepted weekly/monthly review outputs; do not let dashboard/admin work displace the July health/relationships/finance/leisure focus.
Open loops

Unresolved system work

  • Status: Cleaned into an active control surface; 2026-07-19 hygiene found active-loop count still within the max-10 rule, with relationship/fatherhood wording stale but too sensitive to auto-rewrite.
  • Current priority: keep active loops to a maximum of 10 and stop closed/parked/system items from competing with live priorities.
  • Active signals: relationship/fatherhood clarity, mental-health support profile, finance stability, Princess UX organization, execution-layer hygiene, immigration follow-up, social rebuild, career/business experiments, scheduled medical follow-up, and Sapho server storage pressure.
  • Open loops: active loops are below; Sapho 2.0 upgrades are tracked in sapho-upgrade-roadmap.
Decisions

Operating commitments

  • Status: Active decision history.
  • Current priority: capture actual decisions, not every idea.
  • Active signals: strategy, dashboard, taxonomy, task-system decisions, and staged supersession candidates that should not be auto-written without explicit acceptance.
Source-of-truth rules

Routing matrix

Use these rules to prevent the same concern from living in several places.

Question
Home
Rule
Should this load every session?
Memory
Only compact, durable facts. No project state.
Will this matter again in structured form?
Wiki
Use the owning system or area page; raw stays separate.
Is this a repeatable procedure?
Skill
Keep it action-shaped; avoid archive-shaped manuals.
Should it recur automatically?
Cron
Schedule only when recurrence creates real value.
Is it directly actionable?
TickTick
If it cannot be done, clarify before adding.
Is it original messy evidence?
Raw
Preserve source first; synthesize later on request.
Is it recovery/history material?
Backups
Keep available, but separate from live operating pages.
Dashboard architecture

Visible control surfaces

The dashboard displays the system. It should not become the source of truth.

Life Admin

Default landing: active goals, today, and this week.

Area cockpits

Health, Finance, Relationships, Career, Leisure, and My Life Story.

Decision aids

Small tools such as the Hedonistic Calculator, without backend clutter.

Sapho System

This architecture map, routing rules, and source-page access.

Wiki

Full graph and expandable source pages when deeper context is needed.

Dashboard rules

Current display contract

  • Status: GitHub Pages dashboard opens as Sapho's Dashboard organized into tabs for Life Admin, Health, Finance, Relationships, Career, Leisure, My Life Story, Sapho System, and Wiki. The Hedonic Calculator is embedded in the Leisure tab.
  • Current priority: keep Life Admin as the default action-oriented command center while giving each major life area, decision aid, and Sapho System its own surface.
  • Active signals: current strategy, editable Life Admin weekly-goal priorities and Goal Spine commitments, active weekly/monthly goal sentences and progress bars, Morning Command Card draft/acceptance surface, live TickTick dated tasks with dashboard-only score controls, Goal Spines, SimpleFIN finance cockpit, Health cockpit, Hevy/pickleball/activity rhythm, Relationships cards, Leisure pipeline, My Life Story scaffold, Sapho System summaries, active cron inventory, skill inventory, SOUL/memory/wiki/system artifact inventory, wiki graph, and expandable page cards.
Design principle

Less machine, more leverage

The system should feel like a clean operating cockpit: enough structure to preserve continuity, not so much structure that maintaining the structure becomes the work.

Source pages

Full system records

Expandable source cards remain available below the architecture cockpit.

The Hedonic Calculator is embedded in the Leisure tab. - Current priority: keep Life Admin as the default action-oriented command center while giving each major life area, decision aid, and Sapho System its own surface. - Active signals: current strategy, editable Life Admin weekly-goal priorities and Goal Spine commitments, active we

Wiki

Continuity map: graph, search, and expandable source pages.

Wiki graph

Interactive dot map of the live wiki pages and their wikilinks.

Areas System Inbox Entities Plans Raw Root

Selected page

Click a dot to preview a page here and jump to the full page below.

Full wiki pages

Every live wiki page is listed below as an expandable card.

Root

Wiki Schema
SCHEMA.md
degree 3

This wiki stores structured continuity for Jenffry and Sapho. Its root operating doctrine is sapho-operating-system: Jenffry ↔ World ↔ Sapho, where goals drive needed perception, tools/sensors, Sapho judgment, action, feedback, and goal adjustment. The wiki mu

Sapho Operating System

Wiki Schema

Purpose

This wiki stores structured continuity for Jenffry and Sapho. Its root operating doctrine is sapho-operating-system: Jenffry ↔ World ↔ Sapho, where goals drive needed perception, tools/sensors, Sapho judgment, action, feedback, and goal adjustment.

The wiki must keep Sapho goal-serving rather than tool-serving: life-area goals live in areas/, system doctrine and routing live in system/, raw capture lives in inbox//raw/, and dashboard surfaces display source-owned truth.

Root operating pages

The top-level system pages are:

  1. system/sapho-operating-system.md — root operating doctrine and goal-serving architecture.
  2. system/strategic-orientation.md — session-start boot map for goals, life areas, available context, and tool/signal surfaces.
  3. system/current-strategy.md — current priorities, weekly/monthly direction, and active operating rule.
  4. system/source-of-truth-registry.md — canonical homes and routing discipline.
  5. system/sapho-system-map.md — layer/tool architecture map.
  6. system/dashboard.md — dashboard feed and presentation contract.

Any major wiki, cron, dashboard, SOUL, memory, or tool redesign should be checked against system/sapho-operating-system.md first.

Folder roles

  • areas/ — life-area pages and subpages. This is the main personal operating map.
  • system/ — root operating model, current strategy, source-of-truth rules, dashboard/open-loop/decision infrastructure, and Sapho system governance.
  • inbox/ — raw-but-active capture pages such as brain dumps and perception logs.
  • entities/ — stable people/entity context.
  • raw/ — source material and reference/archive content.
  • plans/ — implementation or migration plans.

Life-area taxonomy

Keep top-level life areas small:

  • Health
  • Relationships
  • Finances
  • Career
  • Leisure
  • Life Admin

Prefer sublabels before creating new top-level areas. Keep friendship/social rebuilding under Relationships/Social; keep hobbies, restoration, outings, and fun activities under Leisure. Keep partner/fatherhood under Relationships. Use Life Admin for concrete administrative obligations, including immigration/citizenship unless that domain later earns a dedicated page.

Dashboard summary contract

Dashboard-fed pages should include:

## Dashboard summary

- Status:
- Current priority:
- Active signals:
- Open loops:
- Next concrete move:

The dashboard should be fed by sections inside real pages, not by duplicate dashboard-only pages or a dashboard-only mini-wiki.

system/dashboard.md is the home for dashboard feed rules and implementation notes, not the home for status widgets that belong to other pages. For example: progress belongs in system/progress-tracking.md, perception patterns belong in inbox/perception-log.md, and brain-dump review state belongs in inbox/brain-dump-sessions.md.

Preservation rule

No content should be deleted during restructuring. If pages are merged, preserve source content in destination pages, a backup, or a raw/reference archive before retiring the old page.

Update rule

When a meaningful wiki change is made:

  1. Update affected wikilinks.
  2. Update index.md if page structure changes.
  3. Append a concise entry to log.md.
  4. If the change affects user-facing state, update the relevant ## Dashboard summary.
Wiki Index
index.md
degree 47

sapho-operating-system — root operating doctrine: Jenffry ↔ World ↔ Sapho, goal loops, inner/outer signals, sensors/actuators, anti-drift rules. strategic-orientation — session-start boot map: goals, life areas, available context, and tool/signal surfaces. cur

Sapho Operating SystemStrategic OrientationCurrent StrategySource of Truth RegistrySapho System MapLife Area Signal MapClarity and Decision ProtocolDashboard

Wiki Index

Core operating model

  • sapho-operating-system — root operating doctrine: Jenffry ↔ World ↔ Sapho, goal loops, inner/outer signals, sensors/actuators, anti-drift rules.
  • strategic-orientation — session-start boot map: goals, life areas, available context, and tool/signal surfaces.
  • current-strategy — current control tower and active weekly/monthly direction.
  • source-of-truth-registry — canonical homes and routing rules.
  • sapho-system-map — architecture map of layers and tools.
  • life-area-signal-map — maps each life area to sensors, actions, feedback loops, and anti-bloat guardrails.
  • clarity-and-decision-protocol — protocol for turning foggy conversation into decisions, open loops, next moves, and wiki-worthy continuity.
  • dashboard — visible cockpit/rendering contract.
  • outer-signal-audit — audit of external/world signal sources and their goal usefulness.
  • inner-signal-audit — audit of check-ins, habit notes, perception dumps, mood questions, and anti-rumination signal rules.
  • check-in-responses — saved replies to scheduled check-ins so daily/weekly reviews can maintain alignment context.
  • continuity-steward — automatic continuity capture, daily integration, and weekly wiki-improvement policy.
  • continuity-steward-capture — temporary staging page for steward-captured continuity candidates before daily integration.

Raw sources

Raw source material lives under raw/ and is preserved as evidence/reference rather than edited working memory.

Wiki Log
log.md
degree 15

Added a repeatable OFSEC social interaction practice framework to areas/relationships/social.md: Open, Follow, Share, Expand, Close. Captured the clean-rep standard: one opener, one follow-up, one small self-share, and a light close without self-attack; the go

Perception LogBrain Dump SessionsSapho Operating SystemSapho System MapSource of Truth RegistryCurrent StrategyDashboardDecision Log

Wiki Log

2026-07-15 — Social interaction framework added

  • Added a repeatable OFSEC social interaction practice framework to areas/relationships/social.md: Open, Follow, Share, Expand, Close.
  • Captured the clean-rep standard: one opener, one follow-up, one small self-share, and a light close without self-attack; the goal is practice, not immediate friendship or perfect confidence.

2026-07-15 — Health planning updates captured

  • Updated TickTick 🏋‍♂Health task ENT follow up into Call ENT to reschedule missed appointment, due 2026-07-15, with context that the appointment was missed and needs rescheduling.
  • Captured Jenffry's health updates in areas/health/physical-health.md: cardiology ultrasound follow-up is done and good, repeat testosterone test improved, urology follow-up is already scheduled, meal prep still needs refinement, and workout routine direction is cardio days as pickleball plus a future 3-days/week full-body program.
  • Removed the workout-routine decision from active system/open-loops.md because Jenffry chose the direction for now; updated the testosterone/lipid loop to reflect scheduled urology follow-up; added Sapho server storage pressure as a separate system open loop after verifying /opt/data at 91% used with about 3.3 GB available.
  • Updated system/current-strategy.md and areas/health.md so the active health anchor is ENT rescheduling plus protected workouts/meal-prep refinement rather than stale cardiology/tinnitus-search wording.

2026-07-05 — Weekly Sapho maintenance repaired dashboard publish stale-lease failure

  • Verified that Daily dashboard source refresh (b7a5b1d24d5c) refreshed local finance/physical-health sources but failed while publishing the generated dashboard to GitHub Pages.
  • Patched /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py so future publish failures preserve subprocess stdout/stderr in cron logs instead of hiding actionable Git errors behind a generic traceback.
  • Diagnosed the real publish failure as stale origin/main tracking info for git push --force-with-lease, not missing credentials; patched the publisher to git fetch origin main before pushing.
  • Reran /opt/data/scripts/daily_dashboard_source_refresh_direct.sh successfully and verified generated plus live dashboard markers.
  • Updated system/dashboard.md and closed the temporary system open loop in system/open-loops.md.
  • Patched the wiki-dashboard-publishing skill with the stale force-with-lease pitfall so future dashboard-publish repairs distinguish stale remote-tracking info from credential failures.

2026-07-05 — Weekly goal proposal refreshed

  • Updated system/current-strategy.md with the proposed 2026-07-06 to 2026-07-12 weekly goal from the Sunday weekly review: protect the three-session body rhythm, make the relationship/fatherhood conversation container real, run a low-spend reset week, and choose one leisure/social anchor.
  • Marked the goal as pending Jenffry acceptance, cuts, or correction before treating it as final.

2026-07-01 — Leisure movie lead added

  • Added Pan's Labyrinth 20th Anniversary to the Leisure Pipeline and matching dated TickTick Leisure task for the Oct 9, 2026 theatrical re-release.

2026-06-28 — Weekly goal proposal refreshed

  • Updated system/current-strategy.md with the proposed 2026-06-29 to 2026-07-05 weekly goal from the Sunday weekly review: consolidate health rhythm, make one relationship/fatherhood responsibility move, tighten finance/subscription drift, and choose one July 4 weekend fun anchor.
  • Marked the goal as pending Jenffry acceptance, cuts, or correction before treating it as final.

2026-06-24 — Minions movie lead corrected

  • Corrected the Minions leisure lead from the wrong already-released title to the upcoming 2026 movie after Jenffry's correction and web verification.

2026-06-24 — Leisure movie leads added

  • Added two verified movie leads to the Leisure Pipeline and matching TickTick Leisure tasks after checking current release information.

2026-06-24 — Leisure movie leads cleaned up

  • Removed one completed movie lead from the Leisure Pipeline after Jenffry reported seeing it.
  • Added the remaining not-yet-tasked movie/screening leads to TickTick under Leisure, leaving the already-existing movie task alone.

2026-06-21 — Weekly Sapho system maintenance

  • Fixed active dashboard-governance drift in system/dashboard.md: the Life Admin render contract no longer says the removed Strategic top 3 card belongs on the landing surface.
  • Refreshed system/progress-tracking.md so the current week points to the accepted 2026-06-22 to 2026-06-28 weekly goal: gym three times, pickleball once, one leisure outing, and focused work.
  • Repaired morning-check-in cron drift: schedule and prompt now agree on Monday–Saturday 5:30 AM America/New_York (30 9 * * 1-6 during EDT), matching the standing review cadence.
  • Noted maintenance findings for local review: /opt/data remains under disk pressure at 98% usage, and the Continuity Steward weekly wiki-improvement script completed some wiki effects but is marked failed by cron because the script exceeded the 120s script timeout.

2026-06-21 — Weekly goal accepted: leisure, health routine, work focus

  • Replaced the earlier task-heavy weekly proposal in system/current-strategy.md with Jenffry's accepted weekly goal: gym three times, pickleball once, one leisure outing, and focused work.
  • Noted the correction that the week should be grounded in what resonates from the long-term goals rather than a broad task stack.

2026-06-21 — Life Admin goal display simplified

  • Removed the Strategic top 3 card from the Life Admin dashboard Goals section.
  • Rewrote dashboard-facing weekly/monthly Goal Spine lines for the main life areas in shorter, more direct plain English.
  • Shortened the active weekly and monthly goal sentences in system/current-strategy.md so the dashboard reads less like internal strategy notes.

2026-06-21 — Weekly goal proposal refreshed

  • Updated system/current-strategy.md with the proposed 2026-06-22 to 2026-06-28 weekly goal from the Sunday weekly review: consolidate health-baseline progress into rhythm, protect body/social anchors, make one relationship/fatherhood responsibility move, and tighten the finance guardrail.
  • Marked the goal as pending Jenffry acceptance, cuts, or priority correction before treating it as final.

2026-06-20 — Continuity Steward v1 implemented

  • Created system/continuity-steward.md as the policy page for automatic routine wiki-continuity capture, daily integration, and weekly wiki improvement.
  • Created system/continuity-steward-capture.md as the temporary staging page for captured continuity candidates before canonical integration.
  • Added /opt/data/scripts/continuity_steward.py and wrapper scripts for capture, integration, and weekly improvement.
  • Created three local/no-agent cron jobs: capture every 3 hours (95826cd4c553), daily integration at 08:30 UTC (2487123d66a4), and weekly wiki improvement Sunday 08:45 UTC (9e5b94104611).
  • Updated index.md, source-of-truth-registry.md, sapho-operating-system.md, and the jenffry-continuity skill so routine wiki continuity is owned by the automatic Steward rather than Sapho's live conversation loop.

2026-06-20 — Fatherhood unwanted-responsibility signal saved

  • Added the raw unwanted-fatherhood signal to areas/relationships/clarity-sessions.md: Jenffry loves Nolan and accepts duty, but part of him does not want fatherhood and this must be integrated rather than denied.
  • Propagated the fatherhood guardrail to areas/relationships/fatherhood.md: do not flatten the signal into “he will take care of him, so it is fine”; prevent unwanted responsibility from becoming resentment, disappearance, or Nolan's wound.

2026-06-18 — Health Connect integration clarification

  • Clarified that Jenffry meant a Sapho-side Health Connect data integration like Hevy/TickTick, not more work in the Android app UI.
  • Constraint: Health Connect is on-device Android storage, not a Hevy/TickTick-style cloud REST API Sapho can call directly from /opt/data; a phone-side bridge/exporter is required before Sapho can ingest Health Connect data on the server/dashboard.

2026-06-18 — Relationship clarity shifted to conversation preparation

  • Added the latest divorce/relationship clarity synthesis to areas/relationships/clarity-sessions.md: another marital attempt is not honest, doing nothing risks false hope, the remaining reservation is fear, and realistic separation still seems more honest than false husbandhood.
  • Propagated the partner/open-loop implication: next work is preparing an Aubrey-facing truth/separation conversation with shared language and anti-cave safeguards, not broad abstract divorce analysis.

2026-06-15 — Relationship final-attempt test answers

  • Added Jenffry's upgraded decision-frame answers to areas/relationships/clarity-sessions.md: the final attempt would test whether he can stay and live a life he will not regret; Aubrey would need to know he might still choose to leave even if not miserable; failure signals are no attraction, continued repulsion, resentment, and self-abandonment; separation breaks around Nolan, money, guilt, logistics, Aubrey's pain, bad-guy fear, and fantasy-freedom fear.

2026-06-15 — Decision-framework research added to clarity skill

  • Researched decision-making frameworks and added a digest to clarity-decision-session/references/decision-frameworks-research-2026-06-15.md.
  • Upgraded the clarity-decision-session skill with a Decision Framework Selector using Cynefin, Decision Quality, WRAP, premortem/success-story simulation, Recognition-Primed Decision, OODA, and restrained decisional balance.
  • Updated system/clarity-and-decision-protocol.md so consequential clarity sessions use the smallest useful framework set instead of defaulting to generic pros/cons.

2026-06-15 — Relationship clarity return signal

  • Added the Indiana-return relationship clarity signal to areas/relationships/clarity-sessions.md: genuine happiness at Aubrey/Nolan returning, persistent lack of attraction/repulsion, softening under confrontation, final-attempt option feeling less aversive, and fatherhood/selfishness warning signals.
  • Propagated the durable implications to areas/relationships/partner.md, areas/relationships/fatherhood.md, and system/open-loops.md instead of treating the conversation as single-home context.

2026-06-15 — Clarity and decision protocol operationalized

  • Created system/clarity-and-decision-protocol.md as the human-readable protocol for using Sapho to gain clarity, talk through fog, make decisions, and route durable outcomes.
  • Created the clarity-decision-session skill as the repeatable procedure for clarity sessions, decision rooms, alignment checks, and wiki-promotion decisions.
  • Wired the protocol into system/sapho-operating-system.md, system/strategic-orientation.md, system/source-of-truth-registry.md, system/context-compiler.md, system/decision-log.md, and index.md.
  • Clarified that wiki-worthy context includes anything worth preserving so Jenffry does not have to say it again later; this should be proactive, not dependent on him saying “save this.”
  • Added a multi-home propagation rule: one decision conversation may need entries in multiple wiki areas, especially relationship/divorce sessions affecting clarity evidence, partner goals, fatherhood guardrails, open loops, decisions, and current strategy.

2026-06-10 — Life-area sensor/action/feedback map

  • Created system/life-area-signal-map.md to map Health, Relationships, Finances, Career, Leisure, Life Admin, and My Life Story to goal-serving sensors, actions, feedback loops, and anti-bloat guardrails.
  • Wired the map into the wiki index, strategic orientation, and Sapho operating system so future reviews can use it as the bridge between Goal Spines and concrete tool use.

2026-06-10 — Inner-signal audit and daily prompt calibration

  • Created system/inner-signal-audit.md as the home for check-ins, habit notes, perception dumps, mood/capacity questions, and anti-rumination signal rules.
  • Marked daily/night check-ins and capacity questions as done for now; daily recurring outputs should ask planning questions, not sleep/capacity scores.
  • Updated progress-tracking, mental-health, sapho-operating-system, strategic-orientation, perception-log, and dashboard publishing so the live system no longer treats sleep/capacity scoring as the default daily prompt.
  • Republished the dashboard after replacing the Personal Signals sleep/capacity cards with planning-signal coverage and rumination only when explicitly tracked.
Chronological record of wiki actions.
Format: ## [YYYY-MM-DD] action | subject
Actions: create, ingest, update, query, lint, archive, delete

[2026-06-09] create | Check-in response ledger

  • Created system/check-in-responses.md as the home of record for Jenffry's replies to scheduled morning/evening/weekly/monthly check-ins.
  • Updated system/current-strategy.md and system/source-of-truth-registry.md so daily and weekly reviews treat saved responses as alignment context, not ignorable chat residue.
  • Added the new page to index.md.
  • Added /opt/data/scripts/checkin_context_snapshot.py and attached it to the daily morning, evening closeout, and Sunday weekly review cron jobs so each run receives the latest saved response ledger plus extracted prior check-in outputs.
  • Updated /opt/data/SOUL.md continuity routing so check-in replies point to system/check-in-responses.md and stale current-plan/focus-map references point to system/current-strategy.md.

[2026-06-08] update | Outer-signal audit redone with improvement research

  • Rewrote system/outer-signal-audit.md from the corrected perspective Jenffry requested: evaluate utilization, underuse, improvement potential, and new candidate sensors/tools rather than merely listing current APIs.
  • Used web research on Hermes integrations/skills, Awesome Hermes Agent, OpenClaw/OpenClaw agent templates, and comparable agent/productivity patterns.
  • Added a ranked integration sequence: restore Google Calendar/Gmail cautiously, create a local signal inbox/event ledger, then test Apple Health/wearable data, meeting transcripts, Readwise, budget-intent tools, Home Assistant, food/grocery, and local event discovery only through scoped read-only proofs.
  • Added an open loop for improving Sapho's outer-signal integrations without creating privacy risk, token waste, or admin soup.

[2026-06-08] update | Outer-signal audit web-search correction

  • Updated system/outer-signal-audit.md after Jenffry clarified that outer-signal audits must evaluate tool utilization, underuse, improvement potential, and possible new sensors, not only list current connections.
  • Promoted web search/current-world lookup from a merely on-demand note to a standing perception sensor for informed answers, audits, tool discovery, current facts, docs, prices, venues, and public comparison points.
  • Updated system/sapho-operating-system.md and system/strategic-orientation.md so Sapho's operating loop explicitly uses web search when outside context would materially improve judgment, while avoiding trivial search/token bloat.

[2026-06-08] update | Night closeout progress signal

  • Added the 2026-06-08 evening closeout row to system/progress-tracking.md.
  • Captured a partial day with five visible dated tasks still open and tomorrow carrying a dense health/admin/leisure pile.
  • Kept the closeout aligned to the one-big-task + one-quick-win rule and noted that there was no fresh sleep/capacity self-report tonight.

[2026-06-08] update | Life-area Goal Spine reduction pass

  • Compressed the most drifted Career/Work pages by replacing migrated-source clutter with active operating rules and preserved-source links.
  • Left detailed evidence pages intact where they are useful, especially relationship clarity sessions and Princess project context.

[2026-06-08] update | Relationship practical topics map

  • Framed the map as preparation, not a legal plan or finalized logistics decision.

[2026-06-01] update | June finance budget draft

  • Added a June cash-flow draft to areas/finances.md based on the current biweekly paycheck cadence, current checking/savings, and the live credit-card balances.
  • Set tighter June discretionary caps for shopping, leisure, and dining/social, and recommended paying the cards in full if the month stays on track.

  • Corrected the June card line to use estimated statement-payment amounts from the latest payment pattern instead of the full running balances.
  • Tightened the bills/utilities line by removing irregular items seen only once in history (Pestie and MDWS) from the monthly reserve.
  • Replaced the survival budget with a June EveryDollar zero-based budget that assigns starting cash plus June income down to $0 unassigned.
  • Re-reviewed credit-card dues and corrected the June card estimate from last-payment amounts to an inferred due portion capped by current balances; updated the cash cushion.
  • Rechecked MDWS against all available finance history back to 2026-01-02; it appears once, so it is possible quarterly/irregular rather than confirmed monthly.
  • Removed savings from June available cash; EveryDollar now assigns checking-only starting cash plus June income.
  • Refined June credit-card due estimates using observed payment dates plus estimated statement closing dates; noted that exact closing/due fields require statements or portal data.

[2026-06-01] update | Leisure dashboard pipeline audit and image fixes

  • Removed the stale comic-book-store lead from Leisure and Relationships/Social so it does not reappear in the dashboard pipeline.
  • Consolidated the Leisure wiki back to one canonical Pipeline section for the dashboard to render.
  • Updated Leisure dashboard image matching so the six movie leads use title-specific poster/source images and the VR headset item uses a VR image instead of Elden Ring art.
  • Saved those poster/VR images under dashboard assets so the live page does not depend on fragile hotlink loading.

[2026-06-01] update | Leisure pipeline movie leads saved

  • Added six movie leads from screenshots to areas/leisure.md with source image paths and release/theater/showtime details.
  • Published the dashboard after the wiki update so the leisure backlog and pipeline views can pick up the new items.

[2026-05-31] update | Weekly review sync and Sunday cleanup

  • Refreshed system/current-strategy.md with a new active weekly goal for the coming week.
  • Added the Sunday entry and current-week summary to system/progress-tracking.md after cleaning today's overdue TickTick spillover down to one big task plus one quick win.
  • Rescheduled Finish Sapho Dashboard to Monday so Sunday only keeps the intended quick win and system follow-through.
  • Verified TickTick Today/Overdue now contain only the intended Sunday tasks.

[2026-05-31] update | Sapho operating system page de-duplicated

  • Removed duplicate current-strategy links from system/sapho-operating-system.md so the page is a little leaner and easier to scan.
  • Kept the page's operating-rule content intact.

[2026-05-31] update | Jenffry orientation page cleaned

  • Updated entities/jenffry.md to reflect the current Sapho name/role wording, add the current core related pages, and remove duplicate/rotting navigation clutter.
  • Kept the page high-level and orientation-focused rather than adding temporary task detail.

[2026-06-01] update | Progress tracking night closeout note

  • Added the 2026-06-01 daily log line to system/progress-tracking.md after the evening TickTick closeout.
  • Captured the partial day shape: family-invite and phone-safe SSH spillover, with gym bag prep and trash as the remaining visible same-day items.

[2026-05-31] update | Monthly goal rolled to June strategy reset

  • Updated system/current-strategy.md with a new June active monthly goal so the dashboard and monthly review have a current source sentence again.
  • Kept the target aligned to goals-to-execution legibility, health baseline follow-through, budget guardrails, and relationship/fatherhood clarity.
  • Marked the goal as a fresh monthly reset pending the 2026-06-01 monthly review.

[2026-05-31] update | Leisure ordering, images, and calculator submit added

  • Reordered the Leisure dashboard so Spending guardrails comes before Bucket list, and Bucket list comes before Pipeline.
  • Replaced the Bucket list image placeholders with sourced leisure images and added images to every Pipeline item as well.
  • Added a Hedonic Calculator submit button that creates a scored Pipeline item from the current calculator inputs.

[2026-05-31] update | Leisure tab simplified into a single Pipeline

  • Collapsed the Leisure dashboard's separate hobby / future excitement / social-fun sections into one score-sorted Pipeline.
  • Unscored Pipeline items now default to total score 0 until Jenffry manually scores them.
  • Updated the Leisure wiki source and dashboard wording so the new Pipeline contract is reflected in the live page and notes.

[2026-05-31] update | Hedonic Calculator copy tightened and description field added

  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py so the embedded Hedonic Calculator in the Leisure tab now has an activity description field alongside the activity name and same 10-metric leisure rubric.
  • Tightened system/dashboard.md so the wiki copy matches the current Leisure-tab layout exactly and no longer describes the Hedonic Calculator as a separate tab.

[2026-05-29] update | Leisure scoring rubric expanded

  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py so Leisure activity scoring now uses a 10-metric weighted rubric: Enjoyment, Restoration, Excitement, Social, Money, Risk, Novelty, Logistics, Meaning, and Physical health.
  • Kept Money, Risk, and Logistics as friction dimensions and added alias handling so older saved leisure-score rows using pleasure, future, or regret still map to the new inputs.
  • Updated areas/leisure.md and system/dashboard.md to record the new weighted rubric and dashboard wording.

[2026-05-29] update | Dashboard task score backend scaffolded

  • Added dashboard-only 1–5 score controls to the Goals & Tasks TickTick task cards in /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py; TickTick is not written to.
  • Added local SQLite-backed score API /opt/data/scripts/sapho_task_score_api.py, database path /opt/data/task_scores/task_scores.sqlite3, and watchdog cron Sapho task score API watchdog (a92bd543e90d) for the local API.
  • Published the visible score controls to GitHub Pages and recorded the remaining open loop: choose a reachable public HTTPS API URL before cross-device saving is fully live from phone/computer.

[2026-05-31] update | Cloudflare persistence path chosen for dashboard state

  • Chose Cloudflare Workers + D1 as the preferred free cross-device backend for dashboard task/leisure score state and the Hedonic Calculator draft state.
  • Kept the local SQLite API as a fallback/watchdog path and left SAPHO_TASK_SCORE_API_URL as the switch that points the dashboard at the deployed HTTPS endpoint.
  • Updated the dashboard generator copy so the live page reflects the Cloudflare-backed persistence direction.

[2026-05-28] update | Night closeout progress signal recorded

  • Added the 2026-05-28 nightly closeout signal to system/progress-tracking.md: day partial, 5 overdue spillover, no due-today tasks, and tomorrow's repair focus on Sapho Dashboard.

[2026-05-28] update | My Life Story dashboard tab added

  • Created areas/my-life-story.md as the source page for the bounded life-story reframe project.
  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py to add a My Life Story dashboard tab with source summary cards, Life story Habit Log fragments, writing frame, chapter threads, and global life-story framing from mental-health context.
  • Published to GitHub Pages and verified live markers plus the visible tab.

[2026-05-28] update | Leisure dashboard activity scores and excitement counters

  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py so displayed Leisure activities now show a global activity-fit score plus Pleasure, Restore, Excite, Social, Novelty, Money, Logistics, and Risk scores adapted from the Hedonistic Calculator dimensions.
  • Added Future excitement counters for Leisure pipeline count and consecutive fulfilled Leisure-activity weeks.
  • Published to GitHub Pages and verified live markers plus the visible Leisure tab.

[2026-05-28] update | Dashboard refresh migrated back to GitHub Pages

  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/daily_dashboard_source_refresh_direct.sh so the no-agent source refresh publishes with /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py to GitHub Pages instead of Netlify.
  • Updated live verification to check https://jenffry90-arch.github.io/sapho-workspace-dashboard/ and added markers for Hedonistic Calculator, Leisure cockpit, and Dashboard metrics.
  • Verified bash -n, manual script execution, and live GitHub markers; Netlify remains a fallback host.

[2026-05-28] update | Leisure dashboard TickTick card removed

  • Removed the standalone This week in TickTick mini-card from the Leisure cockpit in /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py.
  • Published the dashboard to Netlify and verified the live Leisure tab order starts with Next 3 planned leisure activities, then Dashboard metrics.
  • Patched the continuity calibration note so future dashboard edits preserve this order.

[2026-05-25] update | Leisure dashboard cockpit simplified

  • Updated areas/leisure.md to split visible leisure ideas into Bucket list and Leisure pipeline sections.
  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py so the Leisure cockpit now shows Bucket list, Next 3 planned leisure activities from TickTick, Pipeline, and Spending guardrails.
  • Removed visible Leisure tab plumbing/source cards: Practice rhythm, Undated options, Leisure source, Social, Hobbies, and Outings.
  • Published and verified generated HTML, raw GitHub, and cache-busted GitHub Pages markers.

[2026-05-25] update | Leisure dashboard cockpit implemented

  • Updated areas/leisure.md with the leisure SMART cascade, dashboard source rules, and preserved idea backlog.
  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py so the Leisure tab now shows a data-focused cockpit: Leisure activity 7/30-day completion rates, Leisure TickTick task pipeline, outing backlog count, and Leisure/Dining & social finance guardrails.
  • Replaced the provisional Leisure goal summary with live progress bars and verified local HTML, raw GitHub, and cache-busted GitHub Pages markers.

[2026-05-25] update | Mental-health goals aligned to final dashboard trackers

  • Updated areas/health/mental-health.md so the dashboard summary, current weekly goal, daily move, and tracking method align with the final 15 TickTick mental-health habit trackers.
  • Reframed the weekly layer around the dashboard's score averages and completion-rate signals while preserving weekly review as the interpretation layer to avoid daily rumination.
  • Patched /opt/data/scripts/daily_dashboard_source_refresh_direct.sh so the existing no-agent daily dashboard refresh verifies mental-health dashboard markers in the same run as SimpleFIN, Hevy, publish, and live marker checks.

[2026-05-24] update | Weekly Sapho system maintenance repaired cron/wiki drift

  • Patched recurring review cron prompts so they reference current canonical wiki homes: system/progress-tracking.md, system/current-strategy.md, system/open-loops.md, system/decision-log.md, areas/leisure.md, and relationship area pages instead of retired concepts/ paths.
  • Updated system/sapho-operating-system.md to reflect that the dashboard/map layer now exists and that the weekly maintenance job is the current full Sapho system improvement loop, not the older continuity-only audit.
  • Verified cron/jobs.json remains valid JSON and hermes cron list --all reports no last errors or delivery errors.
  • Flagged remaining non-urgent lean issue: cron output history is large, mostly from the now-paused standalone dashboard publisher, and should be handled with retention/archival rather than ad hoc deletion.

[2026-05-25] update | Final TickTick mental-health habit tracker list

  • Finalized 15 TickTick habit trackers: Stop checking, Therapy, Physical activity, Healthy diet, Walk, no phone, Social outing, Mood, Sleep, Anxiety, Energy, Relax, Leisure activity, Life story, Self reflect, and Meditate.
  • Stop checking, Healthy diet, Mood, Sleep, Anxiety, and Energy are daily 1–5 + note trackers.
  • Walk, no phone and Self reflect are daily note trackers.
  • Therapy, Physical activity, Social outing, Leisure activity, and Life story are at least once/week + note trackers.
  • Relax is at least 3/week + note; Meditate is at least 5/week + note.
  • Habit Log notes are now intentionally included in the public dashboard via /opt/data/wiki/private/health/mood-tracking-notes.md.

[2026-05-25] update | TickTick mental-health habits consolidated

  • Consolidated mental-health TickTick tracking to six active habits: Sleep, Mood, Anxiety, Energy, Relax, and Meditate.
  • Archived Outward-focus action and the 25 Boolean choice-score habits (Sleep 1–Sleep 5, Mood 1–Mood 5, Anxiety 1–Anxiety 5, Energy 1–Energy 5, Body calm 1–Body calm 5) to reduce admin soup.
  • Renamed the body-calm signal to Relax.
  • Set Anxiety to Option B: 1 = poor anxiety control, 5 = strong anxiety control.
  • Dashboard originally read Habit Log emoji scores from the six-habit setup and wrote raw Habit Log notes to /opt/data/wiki/private/health/mood-tracking-notes.md; this was later superseded by the final 15-habit tracker and public note inclusion.

[2026-05-25] update | TickTick Habit Log emoji scores wired

  • Confirmed TickTick private Habit Records returns content and emoji for Habit Log entries.
  • Verified TickTick web mood enum: cry=10, sad=20, general=30, smile=40, smiley=50; dashboard maps these to 1–5.
  • Updated the dashboard to use Habit Log emoji scores when a local TickTick web cookie is present, while keeping Boolean choice habits as the stable fallback.
  • Initial safety rule was not to publish raw Habit Log notes by default; Jenffry later explicitly changed this so the mood-tracking notes path is included in the public dashboard.

[2026-05-24] update | Mental-health TickTick dashboard changed to choice-score habits

  • Corrected the TickTick mental-health design after Jenffry clarified that mobile habits were only showing complete/not-complete, not direct numeric entry.
  • Deactivated the five unusable numeric score habits and created Boolean score-choice habits: Sleep 1–Sleep 5, Mood 1–Mood 5, Anxiety 1–Anxiety 5, Energy 1–Energy 5, and Body calm 1–Body calm 5.
  • Renamed active tracking habits to remove the Mental health — prefix; current habit names include Meditate, Outward-focus action, and the score-choice habit sets.
  • Updated the dashboard publisher to infer each daily 1–5 score from whichever choice habit is marked, using the latest choice if multiple scores are marked for the same metric/day.
  • Republished and verified the live Health tab shows 27 configured TickTick choice habits and the instruction to mark exactly one score choice per family.

[2026-05-24] update | Mental-health TickTick dashboard source wired

  • Created five TickTick numeric habits for mental-health scores: mood, anxiety, energy, body calm, and sleep.
  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/ticktick_habits.py to support numeric habit creation and safer habit summaries.
  • Updated /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py so the Health tab reads TickTick mental-health habit check-ins and numeric values directly, with wiki fallback only where TickTick has no value yet.
  • Republished the dashboard and verified the generated HTML shows TickTick mental-health scores, seven configured habits, and the stable-source caveat that notes/emojis are not API inputs.
  • Updated areas/health/mental-health.md, system/progress-tracking.md, and system/open-loops.md to make TickTick the source of truth for mental-health dashboard tracking while keeping ignore+redirect out of habit tracking.

[2026-05-24] update | Mental-health SMART goals written

  • Recorded Jenffry's decision that the physical-health goals, dashboard, and Hevy-backed pipeline are complete enough to move into normal review/calibration mode.
  • Updated areas/health/mental-health.md with a SMART mental-health cascade built around fear as the core mechanism and the strategy: ignore, redirect, accept, and embrace.
  • Added concrete monthly/weekly behavior targets: 20-minute acceptance/embrace practice 5 days/week with 3/week as the minimum acceptable floor, daytime ignore+redirect, and non-specific outward-focus actions that will connect to Leisure and Relationships goals.
  • Added an observer-mode reset script and configured lightweight TickTick habits for acceptance/embrace practice plus outward-focus action; ignore+redirect remains in the script, not as a habit.
  • Shifted system/current-strategy.md, system/open-loops.md, system/progress-tracking.md, areas/health.md, areas/health/physical-health.md, and system/decision-log.md toward the new mental-health practice pipeline.

[2026-05-24] update | Compression-summary 429 routing fixed

  • Diagnosed the recurring compression-summary failure as the auxiliary compression task being pinned to openai-codex / gpt-5.4-mini, while the ChatGPT team plan returned usage_limit_reached 429s for that route.
  • Changed auxiliary.compression.provider to auto and cleared the pinned compression model so compression follows the active main route (gpt-5.5 now) instead of the exhausted mini route.
  • Preserved a config backup at /opt/data/config.yaml.bak-compression-20260524-180743 and verified a direct compression auxiliary call returned POST_RESTORE_COMPRESSION_OK.

[2026-05-24] ingest | Life-story and perception dumps captured

  • Captured a new raw brain dump about writing Jenffry's life story and fixing the recurring compression-summary 429 error.
  • Added four perception entries about the checking-vs-processing tension, global “my life is over” language, life-story reframing, and the energy/future-excitement link.
  • Updated areas/health/mental-health.md with compact, non-diagnostic synthesis for the durable recurring mechanisms.

[2026-05-24] update | Physical-health dashboard pipeline cleanup

  • Consolidated areas/health/physical-health.md into the canonical current physical-health source page and preserved the prior migrated material under raw/reference/physical-health-migrated-material-2026-05-24.md.
  • Updated the dashboard architecture docs so the direct no-agent source refresh owns Hevy/SimpleFIN source refresh plus publish/verification, and paused the redundant standalone dashboard publish cron.
  • Clarified review governance: Friday mental-health work is currently the local/background perception-pattern review, not a separate user-facing check-in.

[2026-05-22] update | Physical-health strength ladder added

[2026-05-22] update | Dashboard tightened around physical-health goal ladder

[2026-05-22] update | Dashboard surfaces all Hevy body measurements

  • Tightened the dashboard copy so the physical-health section is clearly a live progress surface rather than a single snapshot.

[2026-05-22] update | Physical-health goals cascade written

[2026-05-22] update | Dashboard propagated physical-health cascade

[2026-05-21] update | Dashboard Today default restored

  • Fixed the tabbed dashboard load behavior so it no longer auto-selects the first wiki node and scrolls to the root page.
  • Today remains the default landing tab; Wiki still opens intentionally when using a wiki page hash or clicking a graph node.

[2026-05-21] update | Dashboard organized into five tabs

  • Implemented the approved dashboard tab structure: Today, Goals & Tasks, Health, Finance, and Wiki.
  • Today is the default command center; Health, Finance, and Wiki are separated into their own focused tabs.
  • Verified the published GitHub Pages dashboard contains the tab navigation and keeps Finance cockpit, Health cockpit, Wiki graph, and page cards available.

[2026-05-21] update | Dashboard life-area summary block removed

  • Removed the extra life-area summary block from the dashboard.
  • Kept area context available through Goals, Finance cockpit, Health cockpit, personal signals, wiki graph, and page cards.

[2026-05-21] update | Dashboard personal-signal clutter removed

  • Removed the two extra personal-signal cards that duplicated gym/activity status and daily-prompt detail.
  • Kept gym/activity information inside the split Health cockpit where it belongs.

[2026-05-21] update | Health cockpit split into mental and physical panels

  • Updated the dashboard Health cockpit so it shows separate Mental health and Physical health sections.
  • Mental health now shows lightweight sleep/capacity/rumination/presence signals plus future data placeholders.
  • Physical health now shows Hevy 7-day/30-day workout rhythm, pickleball/activity signal, weight/measurement trackers, and lifting-goal trackers.

[2026-05-21] update | Dashboard title changed to Sapho's Dashboard

  • Updated the published dashboard browser title and visible page heading from Dashboard to Sapho's Dashboard.

[2026-05-21] update | Daily dashboard source refresh cron added

  • Created cron job Daily dashboard source refresh (b7a5b1d24d5c) to run daily at 9:00 AM America/New_York with local-only delivery.
  • Job refreshes dashboard-facing source summaries from the wiki and TickTick, republishes the Dashboard, and verifies the live page markers without interrupting Jenffry unless a broken-state appears.

[2026-05-21] update | Dashboard reoriented around goals, tasks, and live areas

  • Changed the published dashboard from a generic “Sapho Workspace Dashboard” landing page to a plain “Dashboard” with no hero description.
  • Reworked the first screen to show goals and main tasks for today, this week, and this month from current strategy plus live TickTick tasks.
  • Added provisional goal progress bars by life area, and added finance/health cockpit panels using source-owned budget, progress-tracking, and Hevy signals.
  • Removed the old top-screen “Current bearing,” “Recent continuity changes,” and “Tracking cockpit” framing in favor of Jenffry-facing information.

[2026-05-18] update | Full life-area taxonomy implemented across wiki and TickTick

  • Renamed/relinked main wiki life-area pages to match the final taxonomy: health, relationships, finances, career, leisure, and maintenance, with supporting health subpages mental-health, physical-health, and health-routines.
  • Created concepts/health.md as the Health hub and updated index.md, life-area-map.md, goals-cascade.md, current-plan.md, focus-map.md, and life-rebuild.md around the six-area structure.
  • Simplified Relationships sublabels to partner / marriage and fatherhood; social activity now routes through Leisure.
  • Reorganized TickTick projects to match the taxonomy: 🏋‍♂Health, 💞Relationships, 💰Finances, 💼Career, 🎲Leisure, 🛠Maintenance, plus 🗄Archive.
  • Moved active tasks from the former Social, Hobbies, Achievement, Princess UX/UI, Home / Family Ops, and System & Maintenance projects into the matching taxonomy projects and deleted the emptied old projects.
  • Saved a pre-restructure wiki markdown backup at /opt/data/wiki/backups/life-area-taxonomy-restructure-2026-05-18.

[2026-05-18] update | Life area taxonomy finalized

  • Finalized the life-area structure in concepts/life-area-map.md as: Health (mental health, physical health), Relationships (partner / marriage, fatherhood), Finances (budget, investing), Career (business, work), Leisure (social, hobbies, outings), and Maintenance (no subcategories for now).
  • Clarified that social belongs under Leisure, not Relationships, and that Maintenance stays plain for now.
  • Updated concepts/decision-log.md to record the final taxonomy decision.

[2026-05-18] create | Life area map

  • Created concepts/life-area-map.md to separate real life areas from operating-system pages and to recommend a cleaner canonical set: mental health, body/physical health, family/relationship/fatherhood, finance, career/work/business direction, leisure, and immigration/citizenship.
  • Clarified the merge hierarchy: keep body-system + physical-health together as one area, and keep career-business-direction + princess-ux-work together as one area.
  • Updated index.md to include the new taxonomy page.
  • Verified backup jobs still exist and are enabled: Princess Storybook GitHub backup (90d5cf918b5e) last ran ok at 2026-05-18 18:15 UTC, and Sapho system backup (ff09fc1ab416) last ran ok at 2026-05-18 08:01 UTC.
  • Verified backup repos jenffry90-arch/jenffry-sapho-system-backup and jenffry90-arch/princess-storybook remain private and unauthenticated checks return 404.
  • Confirmed free private GitHub Pages is not available on the current plan, then restored the public sanitized dashboard link because Jenffry said a public link is acceptable if private is not possible.
  • Resumed dashboard auto-publish cron job a8af467ed943; verified the public URL returns 200, contains Dynamic, privacy-sanitized, and does not match checked forbidden patterns.

[2026-05-18] update | Relationship clarity exercise saved

  • Added the therapist-guided four-scenario exercise to concepts/relationships.md: selfish vs selfless while staying in the marriage, and selfish vs selfless while leaving the marriage/not living in it.
  • Added a matching open loop so the next relationship clarity session can use the scenario set instead of keeping the question abstract.

[2026-05-18] create | Life area frameworks

  • Created concepts/life-area-frameworks.md to capture common outside life-area models.
  • Found the usual pattern: 5 to 10 domains, often including health, work/career, finances, relationships/family/friends/partner, personal growth, leisure/fun, environment/home, community/contribution, and spirituality/meaning.
  • Noted that Jenffry's current taxonomy fits the normal range and that a sublabel approach for Relationships matches common Wheel-of-Life practice.

[2026-05-18] update | Relationship sublabels added under Relationships

  • Later simplified Relationships sublabels to partner/marriage and fatherhood only.
  • Linked those sublabels from concepts/life-area-map.md so the Relationships area has clearer internal structure.

[2026-05-18] update | Life-area taxonomy settled on maintenance bucket

  • Jenffry chose Maintenance as the catch-all bucket name.
  • Immigration was moved under Maintenance as a subcategory instead of staying top-level.
  • Updated the life-area map and decision log to reflect the shorter naming set: Health, Relationships, Finances, Career, Leisure, Maintenance.

[2026-05-19] update | Sapho dashboard expanded to full live wiki browser

  • Rewrote the published dashboard generator so GitHub Pages now renders the full live wiki, a wikilink graph, and expandable page cards instead of only a sanitized summary.
  • Updated concepts/sapho-workspace-dashboard-v0-plan.md, concepts/open-loops.md, concepts/current-plan.md, and concepts/decision-log.md to reflect the new full-wiki dashboard state and the remaining archive-toggle question.

[2026-05-18] update | Sapho dashboard public link removed from active use

  • Paused auto-publish cron job Publish Sapho dashboard (a8af467ed943) so private dashboard state will not be republished to the public GitHub Pages URL.
  • Made jenffry90-arch/sapho-workspace-dashboard private and verified unauthenticated GitHub API/web checks return 404.
  • Overwrote the old GitHub Pages URL with a tombstone/unavailable page before disabling Pages, so if GitHub CDN still serves the path it no longer shows the dashboard.
  • Updated concepts/sapho-workspace-dashboard-v0-plan.md, concepts/open-loops.md, and concepts/decision-log.md to reflect that future dashboard work needs private/access-controlled hosting.

[2026-05-18] update | Sapho workspace blueprint open loop

  • Added an open loop to create a concise Sapho workspace blueprint/internal-systems dashboard after comparing the current system to the video's folder/workspace architecture.
  • Framed the need as legibility: mapping life-area rooms, raw capture containers, processed outputs, review cadence, routing rules, and system health without adding admin bloat.

[2026-05-18] create | Sapho workspace blueprint v1

  • Created concepts/sapho-workspace-blueprint.md as the first map layer of the Sapho system (rooms, routing rules, weekly review touchpoints).
  • Updated index.md and the workspace-blueprint open loop in concepts/open-loops.md from pure proposal to in-progress with a concrete next step (test in weekly planning, then decide if a minimal web view is worth it).
  • Marked the 2026-05-18 brain dump session as partially processed with destination links for the handled dashboard item.

[2026-05-18] create | Workspace dashboard v0 implementation plan

  • Created concepts/sapho-workspace-dashboard-v0-plan.md with the concrete v0 scope: read-only HTML dashboard, room-map cards, routing rules, weekly review touchpoints, verification checklist, and non-goals.
  • Updated index.md to include the v0 dashboard plan page.

[2026-05-18] update | Dashboard auto-publish and relevance pass

  • Replaced the manual/static dashboard artifact with a generator script at /opt/data/scripts/publish_sapho_dashboard.py that reads local wiki pages and produces a more relevant public-safe dashboard.
  • Published the updated dashboard to GitHub Pages and verified the live page returns 200 and contains the dynamic dashboard marker.
  • Created cron job Publish Sapho dashboard (a8af467ed943) to regenerate/publish every 30 minutes with local-only delivery.
  • Updated concepts/sapho-workspace-dashboard-v0-plan.md, concepts/open-loops.md, and concepts/decision-log.md with the new auto-update/privacy boundary.

[2026-05-18] update | Brain dump spillover reverted after user correction

[2026-05-18] update | Perception log is a containment layer like brain dumps

  • Updated concepts/perception-log.md so perception entries are captured raw first and not spilled into other pages during capture.
  • Updated concepts/decision-log.md and jenffry-continuity so the perception log works like the brain dump container: capture now, process later only if Jenffry asks.
  • Kept the weekly perception review structure in place for later pattern work.

[2026-05-18] update | Perception log broadened beyond emotions

  • Replaced concepts/feelings-log.md with concepts/perception-log.md to reflect Jenffry's correction that the page should track broad body/mind perceptions, not just emotions.
  • Updated cron job 1052949b0556 to Weekly perception pattern review, reviewing body sensations, emotions, energy, stress, mood, pain/tension, clarity/fog, urges, sensory impressions, and random/mixed perceptions.
  • Updated index.md, concepts/decision-log.md, persistent memory, and jenffry-continuity with the broadened scope.

[2026-05-18] create | Initial feelings log and weekly pattern review

  • Created the initial feelings-log concept and cron job; later superseded the same day by concepts/perception-log.md after Jenffry clarified the scope should include body sensations and broad/random perceptions, not only emotions.

[2026-05-18] update | Processed brain dumps removed from inbox

  • Updated concepts/brain-dump-sessions.md: processed brain dump sessions should be deleted from that page after durable outputs are saved/logged, so the page remains a temporary inbox instead of a noisy archive.
  • Updated cron job 7445bd2463da and jenffry-continuity so weekly brain dump reviews remove fully processed session blocks instead of retaining processed content.
  • Updated concepts/decision-log.md with the correction.

[2026-05-18] update | Brain dump processing status added

  • Updated concepts/brain-dump-sessions.md with explicit processing fields: Status, Reviewed on, Processed on, and Action taken / destination links.
  • Updated weekly brain dump review cron job 7445bd2463da so it can distinguish raw/unprocessed, reviewed/proposed, partially processed, and processed sessions.
  • Patched jenffry-continuity so future captures mark new dumps as raw/unprocessed.

[2026-05-18] update | Weekly brain dump review cron created

  • Created cron job Weekly brain dump review (7445bd2463da) for Sunday 6:00 PM America/New_York during EDT (0 22 * * 0 UTC), delivered to Telegram.
  • Purpose: review concepts/brain-dump-sessions.md, preserve raw dumps, add later-organization notes, extract only clear durable wiki items, and propose TickTick tasks instead of creating them unless explicitly requested.
  • Updated concepts/decision-log.md with the operating-system decision.

[2026-05-18] create | Brain dump sessions page

  • Created concepts/brain-dump-sessions.md as the raw capture page for Jenffry's freeform brain dump sessions.
  • Rule: when Jenffry says "this is a brain dump session" or clearly identifies a message as a brain dump, Sapho captures the stream there first and organizes it later on request.
  • Updated index.md to include the page.

[2026-05-18] update | Daily tracking signal logged

  • Logged Monday morning signals in concepts/weekly-progress-dashboard.md: sleep 4/5, capacity 4/5, observer-mode 2/5.
  • Kept the note compact: solid operating state; protect a narrow plan despite work noise.

[2026-05-17] update | Model-routing policy matrix open loop

  • Added an open loop to formalize a visible Sapho model-routing matrix before considering a custom auto-router.
  • Scope: job/session type, default model, allowed fallback, forbidden downgrade, review cadence, and reason; then audit cron jobs against the matrix.

[2026-05-17] update | Weekend/social idea added: Disturbed concert
